'''鈭歫-n-d''' ('''janada''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jeer|jeer]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-n-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jeer|jeer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歫-n-d
|-
! Lemma
| janada
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:janadithi|janadithi]] || [[word:janadiji|janadiji]] || [[word:janadishi|janadishi]] || [[word:janadi|janadi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:janaduthuth|janaduthuth]] || [[word:janadujuj|janadujuj]] || [[word:janadushush|janadushush]] || [[word:janad|janad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:janaduthu|janaduthu]] || [[word:janaduju|janaduju]] || [[word:janadushu|janadushu]] || [[word:janadu|janadu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:janadufuth|janadufuth]] || [[word:janadufuj|janadufuj]] || [[word:janadufush|janadufush]] || [[word:janaduf|janaduf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:janadethe|janadethe]] || [[word:janadeje|janadeje]] || [[word:janadeshe|janadeshe]] || [[word:janade|janade]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:janadothoth|janadothoth]] || [[word:janadojoj|janadojoj]] || [[word:janadoshosh|janadoshosh]] || [[word:janad|janad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:janadotho|janadotho]] || [[word:janadojo|janadojo]] || [[word:janadosho|janadosho]] || [[word:janado|janado]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:janadofoth|janadofoth]] || [[word:janadofoj|janadofoj]] || [[word:janadofosh|janadofosh]] || [[word:janadof|janadof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:janad忙th忙|janad忙th忙]] || [[word:janad忙j忙|janad忙j忙]] || [[word:janad忙sh忙|janad忙sh忙]] || [[word:janad忙|janad忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:janadathath|janadathath]] || [[word:janadajaj|janadajaj]] || [[word:janadashash|janadashash]] || [[word:janad|janad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:janadatha|janadatha]] || [[word:janadaja|janadaja]] || [[word:janadasha|janadasha]] || [[word:janada|janada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:janadafath|janadafath]] || [[word:janadafaj|janadafaj]] || [[word:janadafash|janadafash]] || [[word:janadaf|janadaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:janadasha|janadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gojanadasha|gojanadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokijanadasha|gokijanadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:janadn眉sha|janadn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gojanadnkn眉sha|gojanadnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokijanadn眉sha|gokijanadn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:janadsh毛sha|janadsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojanadnksh毛sha|gojanadnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijanadsh毛sha|gokijanadsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:janadrosha|janadrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojanadnkrosha|gojanadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijanadrosha|gokijanadrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:janadmusha|janadmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gojanadnkmusha|gojanadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijanadmusha|gokijanadmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:janadsherasha|janadsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gojanadnksherasha|gojanadnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokijanadsherasha|gokijanadsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:janadngasha|janadngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gojanadnkngasha|gojanadnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokijanadngasha|gokijanadngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:janadyasha|janadyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gojanadnkyasha|gojanadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokijanadyasha|gokijanadyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:janadyamasha|janadyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gojanadnkyamasha|gojanadnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokijanadyamasha|gokijanadyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:janadn眉sh毛sha|janadn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojanadnkn眉sh毛sha|gojanadnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijanadn眉sh毛sha|gokijanadn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:janadn眉rosha|janadn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojanadnkn眉rosha|gojanadnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijanadn眉rosha|gokijanadn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:janadn眉musha|janadn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojanadnkn眉musha|gojanadnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijanadn眉musha|gokijanadn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:janadsh毛n眉sha|janadsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojanadnksh毛n眉sha|gojanadnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijanadsh毛n眉sha|gokijanadsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:janadsh毛rosha|janadsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojanadnksh毛rosha|gojanadnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijanadsh毛rosha|gokijanadsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:janadsh毛musha|janadsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojanadnksh毛musha|gojanadnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijanadsh毛musha|gokijanadsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:janadron眉sha|janadron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojanadnkron眉sha|gojanadnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijanadron眉sha|gokijanadron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:janadrosh毛sha|janadrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojanadnkrosh毛sha|gojanadnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijanadrosh毛sha|gokijanadrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:janadromusha|janadromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojanadnkromusha|gojanadnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijanadromusha|gokijanadromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:janadmun眉sha|janadmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojanadnkmun眉sha|gojanadnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijanadmun眉sha|gokijanadmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:janadmush毛sha|janadmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojanadnkmush毛sha|gojanadnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijanadmush毛sha|gokijanadmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:janadmurosha|janadmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojanadnkmurosha|gojanadnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijanadmurosha|gokijanadmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:janad|janad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:j忙n忙d|j忙n忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hojanad|hojanad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoj忙n忙d|hoj忙n忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohojanad|hohojanad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoj忙n忙d|hohoj忙n忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉janad|n眉janad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉j忙n忙d|n眉j忙n忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉janad|n眉n眉janad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉j忙n忙d|n眉n眉j忙n忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂janad|n茂janad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂j忙n忙d|n茂j忙n忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂janad|n茂n茂janad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂j忙n忙d|n茂n茂j忙n忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lujanad|lujanad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luj忙n忙d|luj忙n忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulujanad|lulujanad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluj忙n忙d|luluj忙n忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lijanad|lijanad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lij忙n忙d|lij忙n忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilijanad|lilijanad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilij忙n忙d|lilij忙n忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kojanad|kojanad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koj忙n忙d|koj忙n忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokojanad|kokojanad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoj忙n忙d|kokoj忙n忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kejanad|kejanad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kej忙n忙d|kej忙n忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekejanad|kekejanad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekej忙n忙d|kekej忙n忙d]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
